info.title: Birdeye Data API
info.description:
To utilize the Birdeye Data API, an API key is required for authentication. You can obtain an API key by signing up for a bds.birdeye.so account and generating an API key in your account settings. Include this API key in the headers of your API requests for authentication.

Here's a step-by-step guide on how to obtain an API key: [Birdeye Data Authentication and API Keys](https://docs.birdeye.so/docs/authentication-api-keys)

get.description: Retrieve the latest price information for a specified token.
Retrieve the latest price information for multiple tokens. Maximum 100 tokens

post.description: Retrieve the latest price information for multiple tokens. Maximum 100 tokens

get.description: Retrieve a list of trades of a specified token.
Retrieve a list of trades of a specified pair.
Retrieve a list of trades of a specified token with time bound option.
Retrieve a list of trades of a specified pair with time bound option.
Retrieve a list of trades with various filters.
Retrieve a list of trades with various filters of a specified token.
Retrieve a list of recent trades.
Retrieve candlestick data in OHLCV format of a specified token. Maximum 1000 records.
Retrieve candlestick data in OHLCV format of a specified pair. Maximum 1000 records.
Retrieve candlestick data in OHLCV format of a specified base-quote pair. Maximum 1000 records.
Retrieve candlestick data in OHLCV format of a specified token. Maximum 5000 records. Compared to v1: Added 1s, 15s, and 30s intervals and no candle padding

parameters.name: x-chain
parameters.description: Solana, Base, BSC, Ethereum, Monad, Fogo, Mantle, Hyperevm, Megaeth, Robinhood network .

get.description: Retrieve candlestick data in OHLCV format of a specified pair. Maximum 5000 records. Compared to v1: Added 1s, 15s, and 30s intervals and no candle padding

parameters.name: x-chain
parameters.description: Solana, Base, BSC, Ethereum, Monad, Fogo, Mantle, Hyperevm, Megaeth, Robinhood  network.

get.description: A historical liquidity time-series API for Solana pools, converting raw on-chain pool states into OHLC data for TVL, token balances, and USD-denominated liquidity. It enables TradingView-style liquidity charting, deep liquidity analytics, pool-level liquidity provider tracking, abnormal liquidity event detection, manipulation and rug-risk surveillance, and quantitative backtesting of liquidity-driven strategies. Unlike traditional APIs limited to current snapshots or price/volume data, this dataset reveals the full historical evolution of pool liquidity structure over time, unlocking a new analytical layer for DeFi market intelligence and risk modeling. Maximum 100 records.

A historical liquidity time-series API for Solana tokens, returning OHLC data for total token liquidity, exit liquidity, and stable liquidity. Supports 1m, 4h, and 1D resolutions. Maximum 100 records.
A historical liquidity time-series API for Solana tokens, returning snapshot liquidity data from the open value of each liquidity candle. Supports 1m, 4h, and 1D resolutions. Maximum 100 records.

post.description: Retrieve the latest total, exit, and stable liquidity with the latest price for Solana token addresses. Lite packages can request one address. Starter and higher packages can request up to 100 addresses.

get.description: Retrieve up to 5,000 tokens per batch. For the first request, apply any filter parameters except scroll_id. For subsequent requests, provide only the scroll_id parameter using the next_scroll_id value returned previously. Limited to 1 scroll_id per account per 30 seconds.

get.description: Retrieve holder profile summary for a specified token, including token market data, holder summary, and breakdown by holder tags (bundler, sniper, insider, dev, smart_trader).

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Time interval for volume data. Default: 1h

parameters.name: ui_amount_mode
parameters.description: Display mode for token amounts. Default: raw

parameters.name: include_zero_balance
parameters.description: Include wallets that have traded the token but no longer hold it (zero balance). Default: true

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of wallet positions for a specified token, filtered by holder tags. Returns per-wallet trading data including PnL, volumes, and associated labels.

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of holder tags (`bundler`, `sniper`, `insider`, `dev`, `smart_trader`) to filter by. Default: bundler

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Field to sort by. Default: amount

parameters.name: ui_amount_mode
parameters.description: Display mode for token amounts. Default: raw

parameters.name: include_zero_balance
parameters.description: Include wallets that have traded the token but no longer hold it (zero balance). Default: true

get.description: Identify the earliest buyers of a token and see whether they are still holding, added more, or have sold — useful for spotting early conviction, smart money, and potential insiders. Returns up to the top 1000 first buyers, paginated via offset and limit (offset + limit <= 1000).
Retrieve distribution statistics for token holders based on their share of the total supply. Set include_list=true to return the wallet list for the specified range.
Retrieve timestamped holder-count data points for visualizing a Solana token’s holder trends with configurable intervals, filters, and chart modes.
Retrieve timestamped holder and holding data grouped by Solana holder tag type. Each tag returns up to 100 chart points.
Retrieve detailed information about top gainers/losers

position_scope.description: Calculation mode for PnL. duration_only calculates PnL only for each selected time bucket. cumulative calculates realized_pnl cumulatively from the start time, while unrealized_pnl is based on the all-time open position. Defaults to duration_only.

401.description: Unauthorized. API key is missing or invalid

403.description: Forbidden. Request is blacklisted or not whitelisted

429.description: Too Many Requests. Rate limit reached

extensions.description: USDC is a fully collateralized US dollar stablecoin. USDC is the bridge between dollars and trading on cryptocurrency exchanges. The technology behind CENTRE makes it possible to exchange value between people, businesses and financial institutions just like email between mail services and texts between SMS providers. We believe by removing artificial economic borders, we can create a more inclusive global economy.

xChainParam.name: x-chain

ohlcvCurrencyParam.name: currency
ohlcvCurrencyParam.description: Currency in which OHLCV data is presented. Choose between usd or native token.

tokenAddressFeeParam.name: address

tokenHolderDistributionAddressTypeParam.name: address_type
tokenHolderDistributionAddressTypeParam.description: Return holder distribution by wallet or token account address.

tokenHolderDistributionModeParam.name: mode
tokenHolderDistributionModeParam.description: Holder filter mode (percent = by supply % range, top = top holders by supply %).

tokenHolderDistributionTopParam.name: top_n
tokenHolderDistributionTopParam.description: Number of top holders to return (used only when mode = top).

tokenHolderDistributionMinPercentParam.name: min_percent
tokenHolderDistributionMinPercentParam.description: Minimum % of total supply a holder must have (used only when mode = percent).

tokenHolderDistributionMaxPercentParam.name: max_percent
tokenHolderDistributionMaxPercentParam.description: Maximum % of total supply a holder can have (used only when mode = percent).

poolIdAddressParam.description: The address of the liquidity pool.

minLiquidityParam.name: min_liquidity
minLiquidityParam.description: Specify the lower bound of liquidity. Filter for records with liquidity greater than the minimum liquidity value, excluding those with liquidity equal to the minimum.

tokenListV1MaxLiquidityParam.name: max_liquidity
tokenListV1MaxLiquidityParam.description: Specify the upper bound of liquidity. Filter for records with liquidity less than the maximum liquidity value, excluding those with liquidity equal to the maximum.

checkLiquidityParam.name: check_liquidity
checkLiquidityParam.description: Specify the liquidity value to check.

includeLiquidityParam.name: include_liquidity
includeLiquidityParam.description: Specify whether to include liquidity in the response.

sortByTopGainerLoserParam.name: sort_by
sortByTopGainerLoserParam.description: Specify the sort field. Note: realized_pnl and unrealized_pnl are currently supported for Solana only.

tokenListV3MinLiquidityParam.name: min_liquidity
tokenListV3MinLiquidityParam.description: Specify the lower bound of liquidity. Filter for records with liquidity greater than the minimum liquidity value, including those with liquidity equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MaxLiquidityParam.name: max_liquidity
tokenListV3MaxLiquidityParam.description: Specify the upper bound of liquidity. Filter for records with liquidity less than the maximum liquidity value, including those with liquidity equal to the maximum.

tokenListV3MinMarketcapParam.name: min_market_cap
tokenListV3MinMarketcapParam.description: Specify the lower bound of market cap. Filter for records with market cap greater than the minimum market cap value, including those with market cap equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MaxMarketcapParam.name: max_market_cap
tokenListV3MaxMarketcapParam.description: Specify the upper bound of market cap. Filter for records with market cap less than the maximum market cap value, including those with market cap equal to the maximum.

tokenListV3MinFdvParam.name: min_fdv
tokenListV3MinFdvParam.description: Specify the lower bound of FDV. Filter for records with FDV greater than the minimum FDV value, including those with FDV equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MaxFdvParam.name: max_fdv
tokenListV3MaxFdvParam.description: Specify the upper bound of FDV. Filter for records with FDV less than the maximum FDV value, including those with FDV equal to the maximum.

tokenListV3MinRecentListingTimeParam.name: min_recent_listing_time
tokenListV3MinRecentListingTimeParam.description: Specify the lower bound of recent listing time. Filter for records with recent listing time greater than the minimum recent listing time value, including those with recent listing time equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinPriceChange4hPercentagePar.description: Specify the minimum price change percentage in the last four hours. Filter for records with price change percentage greater than the minimum price change percentage value, including those with price change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinVolume8hUsdParam.name: min_volume_8h_usd
tokenListV3MinVolume8hUsdParam.description: Specify the minimum volume in the last eight hours. Filter for records with volume greater than the minimum volume value, including those with volume equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinVolume8hChangePercentagePa.name: min_volume_8h_change_percent
tokenListV3MinVolume8hChangePercentagePa.description: Specify the minimum volume change percentage in the last eight hours. Filter for records with volume change percentage greater than the minimum volume change percentage value, including those with volume change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinPriceChange8hPercentagePar.name: min_price_change_8h_percent
tokenListV3MinPriceChange8hPercentagePar.description: Specify the minimum price change percentage in the last eight hours. Filter for records with price change percentage greater than the minimum price change percentage value, including those with price change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinVolume24hUsdParam.name: min_volume_24h_usd
tokenListV3MinVolume24hUsdParam.description: Specify the minimum volume in the last 24 hours. Filter for records with volume greater than the minimum volume value, including those with volume equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinVolume24hChangePercentageP.name: min_volume_24h_change_percent
tokenListV3MinVolume24hChangePercentageP.description: Specify the minimum volume change percentage in the last 24 hours. Filter for records with volume change percentage greater than the minimum volume change percentage value, including those with volume change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinVolume7dUsdParam.name: min_volume_7d_usd
tokenListV3MinVolume7dUsdParam.description: Specify the minimum volume in the last 7 days. Filter for records with volume greater than the minimum volume value, including those with volume equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinVolume7dChangePercentagePa.name: min_volume_7d_change_percent
tokenListV3MinVolume7dChangePercentagePa.description: Specify the minimum volume change percentage in the last 7 days. Filter for records with volume change percentage greater than the minimum volume change percentage value, including those with volume change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinVolume30dUsdParam.name: min_volume_30d_usd
tokenListV3MinVolume30dUsdParam.description: Specify the minimum volume in the last 30 days. Filter for records with volume greater than the minimum volume value, including those with volume equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinVolume30dChangePercentageP.name: min_volume_30d_change_percent
tokenListV3MinVolume30dChangePercentageP.description: Specify the minimum volume change percentage in the last 30 days. Filter for records with volume change percentage greater than the minimum volume change percentage value, including those with volume change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinPriceChange1mPercentagePar.name: min_price_change_1m_percent
tokenListV3MinPriceChange1mPercentagePar.description: Specify the minimum price change percentage in the last  minute. Filter for records with price change percentage greater than the minimum price change percentage value, including those with price change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinPriceChange5mPercentagePar.name: min_price_change_5m_percent
tokenListV3MinPriceChange5mPercentagePar.description: Specify the minimum price change percentage in the last 5 minutes. Filter for records with price change percentage greater than the minimum price change percentage value, including those with price change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinPriceChange30mPercentagePa.name: min_price_change_30m_percent
tokenListV3MinPriceChange30mPercentagePa.description: Specify the minimum price change percentage in the last 30 minutes. Filter for records with price change percentage greater than the minimum price change percentage value, including those with price change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinPriceChange24hPercentagePa.name: min_price_change_24h_percent
tokenListV3MinPriceChange24hPercentagePa.description: Specify the minimum price change percentage in the last 24 hours. Filter for records with price change percentage greater than the minimum price change percentage value, including those with price change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinPriceChange7dPercentagePar.name: min_price_change_7d_percent
tokenListV3MinPriceChange7dPercentagePar.description: Specify the minimum price change percentage in the last 7 days. Filter for records with price change percentage greater than the minimum price change percentage value, including those with price change percentage equal to the minimum.

tokenListV3MinPriceChange30dPercentagePa.name: min_price_change_30d_percent
tokenListV3MinPriceChange30dPercentagePa.description: Specify the minimum price change percentage in the last 30 days. Filter for records with price change percentage greater than the minimum price change percentage value, including those with price change percentage equal to the minimum.

offsetParam.name: offset
offsetParam.description: Specify the offset for pagination. Filter for records with offset greater than the specified offset value, including those with offset equal to the specified offset.

typeTopGainerLoserParam.name: type
typeTopGainerLoserParam.description: Specify the type of top gainers/losers. Filter for records with type equal to the specified type. Note: 30d and 90d are currently supported for Solana only.

typeMintBurnTxsParam.name: type
typeMintBurnTxsParam.description: Specify the type of mint/burn transactions. Filter for records with type equal to the specified type.

afterTimeMintBurnTxsParam.name: after_time
afterTimeMintBurnTxsParam.description: Specify the lower bound of time. Filter for records with time greater than the specified after time value, excluding those with time equal to the specified after time.

beforeTimeMintBurnTxsParam.name: before_time
beforeTimeMintBurnTxsParam.description: Specify the upper bound of time. Filter for records with time less than the specified before time value, excluding those with time equal to the specified before time.

sortByMintBurnTxsParam.name: sort_by
sortByMintBurnTxsParam.description: Specify the sort order for mint/burn transactions. Filter for records with sort order equal to the specified sort order.

offset1000Param.name: offset
offset1000Param.description: Pagination start position. Make sure offset + limit <= 1000.

limit100Default70Param.name: limit
limit100Default70Param.description: Number of items per page. Make sure offset + limit <= 1000.

scrollIdParam.name: scroll_id
scrollIdParam.description: Assign scroll_id to continue fetching data from previous scroll request

timeFromParam.name: time_from
timeFromParam.description: Specify the start time using unix timestamps in seconds

timeToParam.name: time_to
timeToParam.description: Specify the end time using unix timestamps in seconds

timeToOptionalParam.name: time_to
timeToOptionalParam.description: Specify the end time using unix timestamps in seconds

beforeTimeParam.name: before_time
beforeTimeParam.description: Specify the time seeked before using unix timestamps in seconds

afterTimeParam.name: after_time
afterTimeParam.description: Specify the time seeked after using unix timestamps in seconds

beforeBlockNumberParam.name: before_block_number
beforeBlockNumberParam.description: Specify the upper bound of block_number for the filter range, excluding values equal to before_block_number.

afterBlockNumberParam.name: after_block_number
afterBlockNumberParam.description: Specify the lower bound of block_number for the filter range, excluding values equal to after_block_number.

walletApiLimitParam.name: limit
walletApiLimitParam.description: Limit the number of records returned.

walletApiBeforeParam.name: before
walletApiBeforeParam.description: A transaction hash to traverse starting from. Only works with Solana.

memePlatformEnabledParam.name: meme_platform_enabled
memePlatformEnabledParam.description: Enable to receive token new listing from meme platforms (eg: pump.fun). This filter only supports Solana.

jupStrictFilterSearchParam.name: verify_token
jupStrictFilterSearchParam.description: A filter to retrieve tokens based on their verification status (supported on Solana).

sourceFilterSearchParam.name: markets
sourceFilterSearchParam.description: A comma-separated list of market sources to filter results (supported on Solana). Available options: ['Raydium', 'Raydium CP', 'Raydium Clamm', 'Meteora', 'Meteora DLMM', 'Fluxbeam', 'Pump.fun', 'OpenBook', 'OpenBook V2', 'Orca'].

targetSearchParam.name: target
targetSearchParam.description: An option to search tokens based on their expected results as token, market, or both.

searchModeSearchParam.name: search_mode
searchModeSearchParam.description: An option to search tokens with exact match or partially match.

searchBySearchParam.name: search_by
searchBySearchParam.description: An option to search tokens by symbol, name, or both.

listTimeFrameParam.name: frames
listTimeFrameParam.description: A list of time frames seprated by comma (,). List of supported time frames: 1m, 5m, 30m, 1h, 2h, 4h, 8h, 24h. Only support Solana, Base.

listTimeFrameDynamicParam.name: frames
listTimeFrameDynamicParam.description:
A list of custom time intervals separated by comma (,). Users can pass up to 8 intervals.
Rules:
- Minute intervals: from 1m up to 1440m (e.g. 1m,15m,16m,17m,89m,90m,92m,1440m ...).
- Second intervals: must be multiples of 5s, from 5s up to 3600s (e.g. 5s,10s,15s,90s,3600s   ...).
- Hours intervals: only support (1h 2h 4h 8h 24h)

listTimeFramePriceStatsParam.name: list_timeframe
listTimeFramePriceStatsParam.description: A list of time frames seprated by comma (,). List of supported time frames: 1m, 5m, 30m, 1h, 2h, 4h, 8h, 24h, 2d, 3d, 7d

listTimeFrameGlobalFeesPaidParam.name: interval
listTimeFrameGlobalFeesPaidParam.description: A list of intervals separated by comma (,). Supported values: alltime, 24h, 8h, 4h, 2h, 1h, 30m, 15m, 5m, 1m. Maximum 3 timeframes per request.

walletCurrentNetWorthFilterValueParam.name: filter_value
walletCurrentNetWorthFilterValueParam.description: Minimum value threshold; returns tokens with value ≥ this (optional, no default).

optionalTokenAddressParam.name: token_address
optionalTokenAddressParam.description: The address of the token contract.

optionalTimeFromParam.name: time_from
optionalTimeFromParam.description: Specify the start time using unix timestamps in seconds

optionalTimeToParam.name: time_to
optionalTimeToParam.description: Specify the end time using unix timestamps in seconds

currentNetworkFlagsParam.name: flags
currentNetworkFlagsParam.description: Modifiers that change result behavior (default: empty; excludes low-liquidity tokens < $100, use include_low_liquidity to include them).

uiAmountModeParam.name: ui_amount_mode
uiAmountModeParam.description: Indicate whether to use the scaled amount for scaled ui amount tokens. Only support solana

uiAmountModeSplitParam.name: ui_amount_mode
uiAmountModeSplitParam.description: Indicate whether to use the scaled amount for scaled ui amount tokens. Only support solana

ohlcvModeParam.name: mode
ohlcvModeParam.description: Select either range (time range) or count (number of candles). If mode is count, time_from and time_to params must exist but not both. Default: range

ohlcvCountLimitParam.name: count_limit
ohlcvCountLimitParam.description: Specify the maximum candles returned. Only used with mode "count". Default: 5000

ohlcvPaddingParam.name: padding
ohlcvPaddingParam.description: Indicate whether to use padding on empty candles. Default: false

ohlcvOutlierParam.name: outlier
ohlcvOutlierParam.description: Indicate whether to allow outliers exist in the results. Default: true

ohlcvInversionParam.name: inversion
ohlcvInversionParam.description: Indicate whether to invert the base/quote on pair. Default: false

memeListSourceParam.name: source
memeListSourceParam.description: Source name of the meme token. Default to all

memeListPlatformIdParam.name: platform_id
memeListPlatformIdParam.description: The program address of the meme platform.

memeListGraduatedParam.name: graduated
memeListGraduatedParam.description: Filter meme tokens which already graduated

tokenListV3MinGlobalFeesPaidParam.name: min_global_fees_paid
tokenListV3MinGlobalFeesPaidParam.description: Specify the minimum all-time global fee paid amount in SOL.

networthType.name: type
networthType.description: Time granularity used to group the returned net worth data. Use `1d` for daily data with full historical coverage, or `1h` for hourly data limited to the last 7 days.

networthTimeOptional.name: time
networthTimeOptional.description: Time get net worth. Default is current time.

liquidityOhlcTimeParam.name: time
liquidityOhlcTimeParam.description: Unix timestamp in seconds used as the anchor time for the liquidity candle window. Defaults to the latest available candle.

liquidityOhlcDirectionParam.name: direction
liquidityOhlcDirectionParam.description: Direction to query candles from the anchor time. Use back for older candles and forward for newer candles.

liquidityOhlcCountParam.name: count
liquidityOhlcCountParam.description: Maximum number of liquidity candles returned. Defaults to 100 and is capped at 100.

tokenAddressV2Param.name: token_address
tokenAddressV2Param.description: The address of the token contract.

transferFlowParam.name: flow
transferFlowParam.description: A list transfer flow: in, out

transferActionParam.name: action
transferActionParam.description: A list transfer action: transfer, set_authority, mint, burn

optionalFromAmountParam.name: from_amount
optionalFromAmountParam.description: Minimum amount filter, support up to 3 decimals

optionalToAmountParam.name: to_amount
optionalToAmountParam.description: Minimum amount filter, support up to 3 decimals

optionalFromValueParam.name: from_value
optionalFromValueParam.description: Minimum value filter, support up to 3 decimals

optionalToValueParam.name: to_value
optionalToValueParam.description: Minimum value filter, support up to 3 decimals

minVolumeParam.name: min_volume
minVolumeParam.description: Minimum volume value, support up to 3 decimals

maxVolumeParam.name: max_volume
maxVolumeParam.description: Maximum volume value, support up to 3 decimals

volumeTypeRequiredParam.name: volume_type
volumeTypeRequiredParam.description: Volume type value to be filtered

walletPnlDurationParam.name: duration
walletPnlDurationParam.description: Time period used to aggregate wallet transactions and calculate PnL statistics.

optionalChartHolderType.name: chart_type
optionalChartHolderType.description:
A list chart holder type: 1d, 1h, 1m, 1s. 
                        Note: 1s chart type only supports data within the last 3 days.

optionalChartHolderMode.name: mode
optionalChartHolderMode.description:
Controls how chart data is handled: 
                        - 'padding' fills missing timestamps to maintain continuity 
                        - 'no_fill' returns only timestamps where values change

optionalChartHolderPercentMode.name: percent_mode
optionalChartHolderPercentMode.description: Defines how percentage change is calculated for a timestamp compared to the first or last record in the dataset (beginning = compare with first record, previous = compare with previous/last record).

optionalChartHolderCount.name: count
optionalChartHolderCount.description: Limit the number of records returned.

optionalChartHolderFrom.name: from
optionalChartHolderFrom.description: Specify the start time using unix timestamps in seconds

optionalChartHolderTo.name: to
optionalChartHolderTo.description: Specify the end time using unix timestamps in seconds

optionalHolderTagType.name: tag_type
optionalHolderTagType.description: Comma-separated holder tag types. Omit to return all supported tag types: bundler, sniper.

optionalChartTagHolderTimeFrom.name: time_from
optionalChartTagHolderTimeFrom.description: Start time using unix timestamp in seconds. Defaults to 3 months before the current time.

optionalChartTagHolderTimeTo.name: time_to
optionalChartTagHolderTimeTo.description: End time using unix timestamp in seconds. Defaults to the current time.

xPerpParam.name: x-perp
xPerpParam.description: Specify the perpetuals exchange. Currently supports hyperliquid.

perpTokenParam.name: token
perpTokenParam.description: The symbol of a coin/token (e.g: BTC, SOL, ETH).

leaderboardOptionalFromValueParam.name: from_value
leaderboardOptionalFromValueParam.description: Minimum total value filter. Defaults to 100,000 and must be greater than or equal to 100,000.

leaderboardOptionalToValueParam.name: to_value
leaderboardOptionalToValueParam.description: Maximum total value filter. Must be greater than or equal to 100,000 and greater than from_value.

pnlChartOptionalTimeFromParam.name: time_from
pnlChartOptionalTimeFromParam.description: Specify the start time in `YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss` format. Defaults to 100 days before the current time. The time range between time_from and time_to must not exceed 100 days.

pnlChartOptionalTimeToParam.name: time_to
pnlChartOptionalTimeToParam.description: Specify the start time in `YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss` format. Defaults to the current time.

optionalPositionScopeParam.name: position_scope
optionalPositionScopeParam.description: Calculation mode for PnL. duration_only calculates PnL only for each selected time bucket. cumulative calculates realized_pnl cumulatively from the start time, while unrealized_pnl is based on the all-time open position. Defaults to duration_only.

prev_cursor.description: Unix timestamp cursor for the previous page of older candles.

has_more.description: Whether another page is available in the returned direction.

direction.description: Internal cursor direction returned for the current result window.

limit.description: Number of history points requested from the upstream liquidity data service.

prev_cursor.description: Unix timestamp cursor for the previous page of older history points.

items.description: A list of objects containing token exit liquidity data

data.description: A hashmap with token addresses as keys and the TokenMetadata object as value
A hashmap with token addresses as keys and the Token Market Data object as value
A hashmap with token addresses as keys and the Token Trade Data object as value

addresses.description: Lite packages can request one address. Starter and higher packages can request up to 100 addresses.

token_address.description: Token address used to identify the first transaction that funded each wallet with the specified token.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

data.description: Array of token data with price information for multiple timeframes

address.description: The address of the token contract.

multiplier.description: Multiplier used to scale the token price

unix_time_update_price.description: Unix timestamp of when the data was updated

price_change_percent.description: Percentage change in price over the specified timeframe

scaled_high.description: Highest scaled price during the timeframe

scaled_low.description: Lowest scaled price during the timeframe

wallet.description: Address of the wallet to retrieve transfers for.

token_address.description: Address of the token to filter transfers by.

flow.description: Transfer direction relative to the specified wallet. Use `in` for incoming transfers or `out` for outgoing transfers.

time_to.description: End of the transfer time range as a Unix timestamp.

from_value.description: Minimum transfer value in USD to include.

to_value.description: Maximum transfer value in USD to include.

from_wallet.description: Address of the sender wallet to filter transfers by.

to_wallet.description: Address of the recipient wallet to filter transfers by.

cursor.description: Cursor used to retrieve the next page of results.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

token_address.description: Address of the token to filter transfers by.

flow.description: Transfer direction relative to the specified wallet. Use `in` for incoming transfers or `out` for outgoing transfers.

time_from.description: Start of the transfer time range as a Unix timestamp.

time_to.description: End of the transfer time range as a Unix timestamp.

from_value.description: Minimum transfer value in USD to include.

to_value.description: Maximum transfer value in USD to include.

from_wallet.description: Address of the sender wallet to filter transfers by.

to_wallet.description: Address of the recipient wallet to filter transfers by.

from_value.description: Minimum transfer value in USD to include.

to_value.description: Maximum transfer value in USD to include.

cursor.description: Cursor used to retrieve the next page of results.

token_address.description: Address of the token to retrieve transfers for.

time_from.description: Start of the transfer time range as a Unix timestamp.

time_to.description: End of the transfer time range as a Unix timestamp.

from_value.description: Minimum transfer value in USD to include.

to_value.description: Maximum transfer value in USD to include.

wallet.description: Holder wallet address. Returned when address_type=wallet (default).

token_account.description: Holder token account address. Returned when address_type=token_account.

creation_time.description: Token creation time as unix timestamp

volume_1h.description: Total trade volume in token amount over the selected interval

volume_1h_usd.description: Total trade volume in USD over the selected interval

buy_volume_1h.description: Buy volume in token amount over the selected interval

buy_volume_1h_usd.description: Buy volume in USD over the selected interval

sell_volume_1h.description: Sell volume in token amount over the selected interval

sell_volume_1h_usd.description: Sell volume in USD over the selected interval

is_scaled_ui_token.description: Whether this token has scaled UI amount. Always returned regardless of ui_amount_mode.

top10_holder.description: Aggregated stats for the top 10 holders

hold_amount.description: Total token amount held by the top 10 holders

percent_of_supply.description: Percentage of total supply held by the top 10 holders

holder_summary.description: Aggregated stats across all labeled holders

total_holding.description: Total token amount held by all labeled holders

percent_of_supply.description: Percentage of total supply held by all labeled holders

holder_count.description: Number of wallets with this tag that currently hold the token

hold_amount.description: Total token amount held by wallets with this tag

percent_of_supply.description: Percentage of total supply held by wallets with this tag

buy_volume.description: Total token buy volume by wallets with this tag

sell_volume.description: Total token sell volume by wallets with this tag

buy_volume_usd.description: Total buy volume in USD by wallets with this tag

sell_volume_usd.description: Total sell volume in USD by wallets with this tag

avg_buy_price.description: Average buy price in USD across all wallets with this tag

pnl.description: Unrealized PnL in USD for wallets with this tag (negative = loss)

labels.description: Labels associated with this wallet for the given token

page_summary.description: Aggregated counts of position statuses for the buyers returned in this page

total_wallets.description: Total number of wallets in this page

buy_more.description: Number of wallets with position_status = buy_more

hold.description: Number of wallets with position_status = hold

sell_partial.description: Number of wallets with position_status = sell_partial

sell_all.description: Number of wallets with position_status = sell_all

buyers.description: List of the first wallets that bought the token, ordered from earliest to latest.

block_number.description: Block number of the wallet's first buy transaction for this token

block_unix_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the wallet's first buy transaction for this token

first_buy_volume.description: Token amount bought in the wallet's first buy transaction

first_buy_volume_usd.description: USD value of the first buy

total_buy_volume.description: Cumulative token amount the wallet has bought up to now

total_buy_volume_usd.description: Cumulative buy volume in USD up to now

initial_holding.description: Token balance right after the first buy. May include tokens transferred in beforehand.

current_holding.description: Token amount the wallet currently holds

position_status.description:
Position status of the wallet relative to its initial holding (the amount it held right after its first buy):
- `buy_more`: current_holding > initial_holding — the wallet actively bought more (highest conviction).
- `hold`: current_holding == initial_holding — the wallet is holding, nothing sold yet.
- `sell_partial`: initial_holding × 0.01 < current_holding < initial_holding — the wallet sold a meaningful portion.
- `sell_all`: current_holding <= initial_holding × 0.01 — the wallet sold almost everything (≤ 1% dust left).

tags.description: Wallet classification tags (e.g. bundler, smart_trader, sniper, dev, insider)

data.description: Holder time series grouped by holder tag type. Each key is a tag type and maps to its time series.

bundler.description: Holder time series for a single tag type, ordered from newest to oldest.

items.description: A single data point in the holder time series for a tag type.

total_holder.description: Number of wallets carrying this tag that hold the token at this data point.

total_holding.description: Total token amount held by the tagged wallets at this data point.

time.description: Start time of the data point as a unix timestamp in seconds.

sniper.description: Holder time series for a single tag type, ordered from newest to oldest.

items.description: A single data point in the holder time series for a tag type.

total_holder.description: Number of wallets carrying this tag that hold the token at this data point.

total_holding.description: Total token amount held by the tagged wallets at this data point.

time.description: Start time of the data point as a unix timestamp in seconds.

additionalProperties.description: Holder time series for a single tag type, ordered from newest to oldest.

items.description: A single data point in the holder time series for a tag type.

total_holder.description: Number of wallets carrying this tag that hold the token at this data point.

total_holding.description: Total token amount held by the tagged wallets at this data point.

time.description: Start time of the data point as a unix timestamp in seconds.

ohlcv.description: Receive real-time updates of candles for tokens or token pairs.

txs.description: Receive real-time updates of token transactions.

base_quote_price.description: Receive real-time updates of candles for any token pairs without needing to input a specific pair address.

token_new_listing.description: Receive real-time updates of newly listed tokens.

new_pair.description: Receive real-time updates of newly traded pairs.

large_trade_txs.description: Receive real-time updates for for large trade transactions exceeding a specified threshold.

wallet_txs.description: Receive real-time transaction updates for specific wallet addresses.

token_stats.description: Receive real-time updates on statistics of one or many tokens.
